item.title: intel / neural-compressor
item.description:
Desc: Intel® Neural Compressor (formerly known as Intel® Low Precision Optimization Tool), targeting to provide unified APIs for network compression technologies, such as low precision quantization, sparsity, pruning, knowledge distillation, across different deep learning frameworks to pursue optimal inference performance.
Lang: Python

item.title: anasty17 / mirror-leech-telegram-bot
item.description:
Desc: Official Repository: Telegram bot which can download torrents, mega, google drive, telegram file and direct links + all yt-dlp supported sites, then upload them to google drive or telegram cloud. This bot supports more features like zip or extract before upload, seed after upload using qBittorrent or aria2c and many more, read features below.
Lang: Python
